race.description: St Albert's College Albies Cup Handicap (C1)
race.comment: COSMOLICIOUS (7) back in class second-up when led throughout from the wide barrier to score a slick win over 1000m at Tamworth in fast time. Heading in the right direction and gets a better set-up for this. Will take catching. CHAMBER OF SECRETS (5) resumes after shedding her Maiden tag at start three last prep. Has a host of gear changes and look for her late from the wide draw. RAINBOW BLESSING (4) well bred filly who can surprise fresh with the fast tempo. Back with the one trial and has the class to test these. ALMOST MAYBE (2)  gets no favours from the draw, but has shown good ability and has to be respected fresh.
